medication_request_missing_required_pair: Agent failed to link the medication order to the required diagnostic observation or context.
unnecessary_service_request_creation: Agent performed an order action when clinical criteria for the order were not met.
observation_not_found_sentinel_value: Agent returned a sentinel value (e.g., -1) instead of handling missing data or re-querying.
excessive_unproductive_resource_queries: Agent entered a loop of redundant or overly broad queries without finding the target data.
patient_age_calculation_error: Agent returned an incorrect age value despite successful patient resource retrieval.
correct_behavior_no_failure: Agent performed correctly but was marked failed due to evaluator mismatch.
missing_unit_in_answer: Agent returned a numeric value without the required unit (e.g., years).
answer_format_wrong_type: returned a list when a scalar or specific string format was expected
medication_dosage_value_missing: Agent created a medication request with a zero or missing dosage value.
